title: Require Service Boundary Exports
forbids: an existing contract, module, or router spine file without one standalone generic const export for its boundary role
why: Direct contract, module, and router exports give the stable oRPC boundaries one predictable local name while leaving service definition and implementation construction to their native APIs.
remediate: Export contract from contract.ts, module from module.ts, and router from router.ts as standalone const declarations. Leave export use and intentional public-boundary decisions to Knip and the dedicated JSDoc law.
message: Each contract, module, and router spine file must export one standalone generic boundary value.
